pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-S-009 (Data Quality/Skill) scores 0.456 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.456) and is in_scope for the Data Quality Manager role. Domain prior: in_scope. Core signal hits: 4. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Data Quality Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, DDaT signal (0.456), and Data Quality handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in 50-80% of Data Quality Manager job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at manager level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality at composite 0.456 is market-validated for Data Quality Manager. Final decision: include.
